_readme: Default activation rules for selftune auto-activation. Copy to ~/.selftune/activation-rules.json to customize.
_note: These defaults are bundled inside the installed skill so setup does not depend on repository-level templates.

rules.description: Suggest `selftune last` when session has >2 unmatched queries
Suggest `selftune evolve` when session pass rate < 60%
Suggest `selftune evolve` when no evolution in >7 days and pending false negatives exist
Suggest `selftune rollback` when monitoring detects a regression
